name: Death Row Confidential: Secrets of a Serial Killer
original_name: Death Row Confidential: Secrets of a Serial Killer
overview: Death Row Confidential: Secrets of a Serial Killer examines the gripping story of convicted killer Joseph Naso, and how a fellow inmate came to connect him to many more cold cases.

trailers.title: Your First Look at Death Row Confidential: Secrets of a Serial Killer Starring Detective Ken Mains
